channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Moderate Water Levels Recorded at Papanasam and Manimuthar Dams in Tirunelveli
item.description: As of Tuesday, the water level in the Papanasam Dam, located in Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, measured 62.80 feet against its full reservoir capacity of 143 feet. The dam recorded an inflow of 1...

item.title: President Marcos pledges support for child facing harassment from local official
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. expressed strong concern after learning about an 11-year-old child who sought help against an allegedly abusive barangay kagawad in Camarines Sur. The President describe...

item.title: Jah Prayzah and Alaine to Perform in Harare for Afro Culture Concert
item.description: Zimbabwean music star Jah Prayzah and Jamaican reggae singer Alaine are set to headline a unique cultural concert titled 'Afro Culture Connect: A Tale of Two Cities' at the Harare International Confer...

item.title: Rising Collision Risks in Earth's Orbit and the Threat of Space Debris
item.description: Earth's orbit, once a vast empty expanse, has become increasingly congested since the launch of Sputnik in 1957. Initially hosting just a handful of satellites, orbital space now contains over 30,000 ...

item.title: Discussion on IOC Policy Restricting Female Sports Categories to Biological Women
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) has recently announced a policy limiting participation in female sports categories to biological females, a move intended to ensure fairness and safety in com...

item.title: Africa Check finds no proof Ruto has dismissed aide Farouk Kibet
item.description: Africa Check has dismissed claims circulating on social media that Kenyan President William Ruto has expelled his long-time aide, Farouk Kibet. The viral story came from a memo allegedly signed by Rut...

item.title: Brandy Reflects on Her Career, Personal Struggles, and Musical Legacy in Memoir 'Phases'
item.description: Brandy’s memoir, Phases, offers an intimate look at her life and career, chronicling both triumphs and challenges. From her early years in Mississippi and California, where she developed her talent si...

item.title: Ian Darling’s The Valley captures the quiet rhythms of life in Kangaroo Valley
item.description: Australian filmmaker Ian Darling’s latest project, *The Valley*, is a three-hour documentary exploring solitude and community life in Kangaroo Valley, inland from Kiama. Centred around residents such ...

item.title: New Eastern Cape police chief Lt-Gen Vuyisile Ncata promises stronger action against crime
item.description: Newly appointed Eastern Cape police commissioner Lieutenant-General Vuyisile Ncata has pledged to intensify the police’s crackdown on violent and organised crime across the province. His appointment w...

item.title: Government Announces Temporary Reduction in Fuel Levy Amid Supply Concerns
item.description: Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana and Mineral and Petroleum Resources Minister Gwede Mantashe have jointly announced a short-term reduction in the general fuel levy to alleviate pressure on consumers ...

item.title: Egypt restricts night-time activity in Cairo amid energy crisis and economic strain
item.description: Egypt has ordered earlier business closures and reduced street lighting in Cairo in an effort to save electricity, following a sharp spike in energy prices caused by the US-Israeli war on Iran. The co...

item.title: Lahore: Woman Allegedly Gang-Raped in Moving Van
item.description: A deeply troubling incident has unfolded near Rawat, Punjab, where a woman alleges she was gang-raped inside a moving van. Police are investigating the matter and have registered a case. Initial repor...

item.title: Trump tells nations affected by Middle East blockade to secure their own oil
item.description: US President Donald Trump don yan say any country wey never join di Middle East wahala but dey face fuel wahala suppose find their own oil for di Strait of Hormuz. For one post for him Truth Social ac...

item.title: Concentration of Vape Shops in Cheetham Hill, Manchester, and Its Impact on the Industry
item.description: Cheetham Hill in Manchester has become an unexpected hub for the UK vaping industry, hosting over 50 specialised vape shops on two adjacent backstreets near the former Strangeways prison. Many of thes...

item.title: Dar Mayor Recognizes Platforms Supporting Tanzanian Creative Talent
item.description: Dar es Salaam Mayor Nurdin Bilal Juma, popularly known as 'Shetta', has highlighted the importance of platforms like Her Creative Spark in supporting and developing young creative talent in Tanzania. ...

item.title: Dar City aim for quarterfinals in decisive BAL Kalahari Conference game
item.description: Dar City from Tanzania dey ready for one important BAL match against Libya's Al Ahly Ly today at SunBet Arena in Pretoria, South Africa. Dis game go determine whether Dar City go advance to the quarte...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee alleges voter enrolment irregularities ahead of Bengal elections
item.description: West Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee has written to the Chief Election Commissioner, Gyanesh Kumar, alleging large-scale attempts by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) to enrol outsiders as voters...

item.title: Victim Calls for Accountability as Statutory Grooming Gangs Inquiry is Launched
item.description: A new statutory independent inquiry into grooming gangs in England and Wales has been launched following revelations from survivors of child sexual exploitation. One victim, known only as Penny, recou...

item.title: Ol Kalou MP Kiaraho to be buried in Tigoni, sparking mixed reactions
item.description: Residents of Ol Kalou are still coming to terms with the news that their late MP, David Njuguna Kiaraho, chose to be buried outside the constituency he served since 2013. His burial will take place at...

item.title: El-Rufai Appears Again In Kaduna Court As His Trial Resumes After His Mother’s Burial
item.description: Former Kaduna State Governor, Nasir El-Rufai, show face for Kaduna State High Court on Tuesday morning to continue him trial wey concern alleged money laundering and financial wahala. Dem see am waka ...
